form.formComment: Freshened for 32 days. Last start finished fifth of 22 starters at Cheltenham on March 10 over 5000m, 13 len behind Johnnywho carrying 71kg at $21. The run before made some head-way from midfield; finished third in a small field at Newbury in the G2 Denman Chase on February 7 over 4700m, on heavy track; 17 len behind Haiti Couleurs carrying 71kg at $5. Definite winning chance. Will need a career best to win.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Freshened for 49 days. Last outing favourite; raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 2 len Kempton Park on February 21 over 4800m defeating The Doyen Chief carrying 71kg at $4 in a steeplechase. Run before favourite; came from midfield and won by 24 len Kempton Park on January 10 over 4100m defeating Leader In The Park carrying 75.5kg at $4.50 in a steeplechase. Sure to improve again. One to take very seriously.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made a bad mistake jumping the final fence.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Freshened for 32 days. Last outing fell at Cheltenham on March 10 over 5000m. Start before finished third in a small field at Haydock Park on January 17 over 5100m, 2.25 len behind Imperial Saint carrying 70kg at $4.30. Gets a chance to win. No forlorn hope for a stable who enjoy success here.

form.formComment: Useful type. Comes off a 49 day let-up. Last outing made ground from midfield; finished third of 9 runners at Kempton Park on February 21 over 4100m, 5 len behind Califet En Vol with 75.5kg at $4.50. Start before sat on the pace then finished second of 9 starters at Ascot on January 17 over 4200m, on slow going 1.75 len behind Vincenzo carrying 71kg at $8. Forward showing expected. Unlikely to be good enough but worth a second look.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after four months got back early finished fourth in a small field at Auteuil in the G3 on March 7 over 4400m, on slow going 21 len behind Secret D'etat carrying 67kg at $12. Previously second-up lost his rider at Auteuil in the G1 on November 16 over 5500m. Market will be the best guide to his chances.
